purpose: Fail-closed manifest for strict hot-path symbols not covered by the current benchmark suite map.

modules.next_action: Add c11 thread lifecycle cases to the pthread benchmark suite and collect strict/hardened baselines.
Create a table/classification benchmark target for ctype lookup-table and locale-free paths.
Create a TLS errno/h_errno accessor benchmark family with strict/hardened mode attribution.
Use the hermetic NSS/resolver lab before timing resolver paths; real network/DNS is not an acceptable benchmark dependency.
Add unlocked stream-operation cases to stdio_bench and wire the stdio suite into perf_baseline_spec.
Create conversion/search/random hot-path benchmarks with deterministic inputs and no process-global mutation leaks.
Benchmark pure conversion paths directly and gate wall-clock-sensitive paths behind controlled fixtures.
Extend string_bench with wchar/wctype symbol-specific cases and baselines.
